question_pt: Quais propriedades OWL têm geo:poco como domínio?
question_en: Which OWL properties have geo:poco as domain?

question_pt: Quais classes têm mapeamento owl:sameAs para o namespace OSDU (w3id.org/osdu)?
question_en: Which classes have an owl:sameAs mapping to the OSDU namespace?
sparql:
PREFIX geo: <https://geolytics.petrobras.com.br/dict/>
PREFIX owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
SELECT ?classe ?label ?osdu_uri
WHERE {
  ?classe owl:sameAs ?osdu_uri ;
          skos:prefLabel ?label .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?osdu_uri), "https://w3id.org/osdu"))
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "pt")
}
ORDER BY ?label

question_pt: Quais classes têm rdfs:seeAlso apontando para o Petro KGraph (PetroNLP)?
question_en: Which classes have rdfs:seeAlso pointing to Petro KGraph (PetroNLP)?
sparql:
PREFIX geo: <https://geolytics.petrobras.com.br/dict/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
SELECT ?classe ?label ?kg_uri
WHERE {
  ?classe rdfs:seeAlso ?kg_uri ;
          skos:prefLabel ?label .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?kg_uri), "PetroNLP"))
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "pt")
}
ORDER BY ?label

question_pt: Quais rótulos alternativos (skos:altLabel) estão definidos para geo:poco em português?
question_en: What alternative labels (skos:altLabel) are defined for geo:poco in Portuguese?
sparql:
PREFIX geo: <https://geolytics.petrobras.com.br/dict/>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
SELECT ?altLabel
WHERE {
  geo:poco skos:altLabel ?altLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?altLabel) = "pt")
}

question_pt: Qual o caminho semântico de geo:poco até geo:regime-contratual via propriedades OWL?
question_en: What is the semantic path from geo:poco to geo:regime-contratual via OWL properties?
sparql:
PREFIX geo: <https://geolytics.petrobras.com.br/dict/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?p1_label ?p2_label ?p3_label
WHERE {
  ?p1 rdfs:domain geo:poco ; rdfs:range geo:bloco ; rdfs:label ?p1_label .
  ?p2 rdfs:domain geo:bloco ; rdfs:range geo:contrato-ep ; rdfs:label ?p2_label .
  ?p3 rdfs:domain geo:contrato-ep ; rdfs:range geo:regime-contratual ; rdfs:label ?p3_label .
  FILTER(LANG(?p1_label) = "pt")
  FILTER(LANG(?p2_label) = "pt")
  FILTER(LANG(?p3_label) = "pt")
}

question_pt: Quais classes têm cobertura em mais de 4 camadas semânticas?
question_en: Which classes have coverage in more than 4 semantic layers?
sparql:
PREFIX geo: <https://geolytics.petrobras.com.br/dict/>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
SELECT ?classe ?label (COUNT(?layer) AS ?n_layers)
WHERE {
  ?classe geo:geocoverage ?layer ;
          skos:prefLabel ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "pt")
}
GROUP BY ?classe ?label
HAVING (COUNT(?layer) > 4)
ORDER BY DESC(?n_layers)

question_pt: Qual o path semântico de geo:rocha-geradora até geo:campo via propriedades?
question_en: What is the semantic path from geo:rocha-geradora to geo:campo via properties?
sparql:
PREFIX geo: <https://geolytics.petrobras.com.br/dict/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
SELECT ?p1_lbl ?n1 ?p2_lbl ?n2 ?p3_lbl
WHERE {
  ?p1 rdfs:domain geo:rocha-geradora ; rdfs:range ?n1 ; rdfs:label ?p1_lbl .
  ?p2 rdfs:domain ?n1 ; rdfs:range ?n2 ; rdfs:label ?p2_lbl .
  ?p3 rdfs:domain ?n2 ; rdfs:range geo:campo ; rdfs:label ?p3_lbl .
  FILTER(LANG(?p1_lbl) = "pt")
  FILTER(LANG(?p2_lbl) = "pt")
  FILTER(LANG(?p3_lbl) = "pt")
}
